A_table_coords.B_table_only_note: 10px above header top; 10px below last row bottom

B_header_coords.detection_method: mean row luminance < 175 for 20 consecutive rows

C_footer_totals_coords.confidence: PROVEN for edges; LIKELY for section labels without OCR

D_visual_anchors: Grey shaded header bar with rounded ends (strongest table-start signal)
Thin horizontal rule immediately above grey header bar
Repeating ~22px row rhythm with ~2px gaps (8 data rows)
Right-aligned numeric columns (PREÇO UNITÁRIO, VALOR MERCADORIA)
OBS: block after last row (text density y≈439-447)
Totals grid with horizontal rules y≈454+
Dark VALOR A PAGAR box in footer
Vertical Aviludo branding strip on right margin

E_confidence_automatic_detection_before_.last_item_row_bottom_simple_column_proje: HYPOTHESIS — qty-column peaks detected 6/8 rows; missed acucar/nata
E_confidence_automatic_detection_before_.B_table_only_top_y218_vs_header_y228: HYPOTHESIS — 10px margin not uniquely identified by luminance scan; empirically required for OCR
E_confidence_automatic_detection_before_.cross_supplier_tabular_invoices: HYPOTHESIS — only this Aviludo FCL template measured
E_confidence_automatic_detection_before_.same_supplier_template_generalization: LIKELY — grey header + fixed column set observed on this invoice family
E_confidence_automatic_detection_before_.overall_realistic_before_ocr_this_templa: LIKELY for coarse table envelope; PROVEN for header band alone; not PROVEN for exact B_table_only bounds via single heuristic
